expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的木板尺寸。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] 是整体尺寸，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan material papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan material papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của Mặt Trên, Mặt Dưới và Bảng Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của Bảng Sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang laki ng tabla para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay ang kabuuang sukat, [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Tuktok, Ibaba at Gilid na Tabla, [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Likurang Tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အိမ်မှန်ကျင်းအတွက် စားပွဲရဲ့ဖြစ်ပါတယ်။၏အနေအထိုင်ဉီးစီးမှတ်တိုင်၊(AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជា ទំហំ សរុប។ ភ្នាក់ងារចំណេះដឹងများစွာ செய்தကွန်ပျူတာနဲ႔... (AI translated, please check)”
